name: jugeeya-tools-site
description: Static site (GitHub Pages). package.json only marks .js as ESM for Node-based build tooling under scripts/; the site itself has no build step.

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/r2tag_wasm.wasm && cp pkg/r2tag_wasm.js pkg/r2tag_wasm_bg.wasm ../tags/wasm/
